introduction:
In Tamil Nadu, the Government Transport Department mandates a strict two-stage process: an initial Learner's Licence (LL) and then a Permanent Driving Licence (DL).

TN offers robust online submission tools via Parivahan, minimizing manual paperwork and making appointment slots transparent.
quickFacts:
Crucial Path
  • LL Test Phase: Completed via online tests (faceless) or computer test at the RTO.
  • DL Test Phase: Wait 30 days. Physical test at RTO is legally required.
  • Combined fees for two stages roughly range from ₹700 to ₹1200 depending on vehicle class.
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

For Learner's Licence (LL)
  • Aadhaar/Voter ID Card
  • Age Proof Certificate
  • Form 1 Digital Declaration
  • Medical certificate Form 1-A (if applicable)
For Permanent DL
  • Original Printed Learner's Licence
  • Recent passport size photos
  • Payment Acknowledgment
  • Application Form 4
onlineApplication:
How to Apply Online

Part 1: Obtain your Learner's Licence (LL)
  1. Access sarathi.parivahan.gov.in and select Tamil Nadu.
  2. Click "Apply for Learner Licence". Choose Aadhaar for the fastest faceless route.
  3. Fill application, submit documents, and pay fee online.
  4. Undergo the LL online traffic road signs test and download the issued e-LL.
Part 2: Obtain your Permanent DL
  1. After precisely 30 days, return to the Sarathi portal.
  2. Select "Apply for Driving Licence".
  3. Enter your LL number and pay the corresponding card and test fees online.
  4. Select your nearest RTO in Tamil Nadu and book a driving test slot.
offlineApplication:
How to Apply Offline / Driving Test

The practical assessment must be done at the scheduled RTO:

  1. Attend the TN RTO with your vehicle marked with an 'L' board.
  2. Surrender your documents to the inspecting authority for verification.
  3. Perform the real-world road and track driving skills test under the watchful eye of the Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI).
afterApplying: Once Approved: You can download the virtual copy of your Licence via DigiLocker. The physical Smart Card Driver's Licence will be posted to your verified address.
helpfulLinks: MoRTH Sarathi Portal TN Transport Dept
